requestedDecision: Refine one threat-model table row's wording so it is precisely backed by code. Current row for 'Endless repeated attempts' claims infrastructure/timeout retries are 'bounded separately', but the implemented stop-infrastructure fires only when the same failure fingerprint repeats more than the configurable infrastructureRetries threshold; infrastructure failures with null or varying fingerprints retry until the global attempt/duration/relative-cost budget stops. Propose accurate replacement wording (one table cell, concise) that discloses the fingerprint-gated bound and the budget backstop without overclaiming.
